description: Install ngx-translate, create English and German translation JSON files, configure the translate module in app.config.ts, integrate translations into all components with translatable strings, and add a language switcher UI in the app header.
review_findings: Fixed 3 of 5 review issues from v1: (1) German umlauts corrected from ASCII approximations to proper Unicode, (2) error fallback strings translated using translateService.instant() with new keys RECIPES.LIST.LOAD_ERROR, RECIPES.DETAIL.LOAD_ERROR, RECIPES.DETAIL.DELETE_ERROR, RECIPES.FORM.LOAD_ERROR, RECIPES.FORM.SAVE_ERROR, (3) language preference persisted in localStorage under key 'rm-lang'. Fixed 2 of 3 review issues from v2: (1) removed lang:'en' from provideTranslateService to avoid double HTTP fetch for DE users, (2) hardcoded EN/DE labels in language switcher buttons and removed APP.LANGUAGE keys from both JSON files. Issue #2 from v2 (no test coverage) is not applicable because the project has no test framework configured.
steps: Install @ngx-translate/core and @ngx-translate/http-loader as dependencies in the root package.json. Run pnpm install.

Create translation files at apps/web/src/assets/i18n/en.json and apps/web/src/assets/i18n/de.json with all translatable strings extracted from the component templates. Organize keys hierarchically: APP (title, nav items), AUTH (login, register, confirm pages), RECIPES (list, detail, form pages). Include all user-visible strings: headings, labels, buttons, links, placeholders, loading states, error messages, empty states, confirmation dialogs.

Update apps/web/src/app/app.config.ts to add TranslateModule.forRoot() configuration with HttpLoaderFactory. Import provideHttpClient dependencies needed for the TranslateHttpLoader. Set default language to 'en'. Use importProvidersFrom to register the translate module providers.

Update apps/web/src/app/app.component.ts and apps/web/src/app/app.component.html: import TranslateModule in the component imports array, replace hardcoded strings with translate pipe (e.g., 'Recipe Manager' becomes {{ 'APP.TITLE' | translate }}). Add a language switcher (dropdown or toggle buttons) in the header nav area that calls TranslateService.use() to switch between 'en' and 'de'.

Update apps/web/src/app/auth/login.component.ts: import TranslateModule in imports array, replace all hardcoded text in the inline template with translate pipe usage (headings, labels, button text, link text).
Update apps/web/src/app/auth/register.component.ts: import TranslateModule in imports array, replace all hardcoded text in the inline template with translate pipe usage.
Update apps/web/src/app/auth/confirm.component.ts: import TranslateModule in imports array, replace all hardcoded text in the inline template with translate pipe usage.

Update apps/web/src/app/recipes/recipe-list.component.ts: import TranslateModule in imports array, replace all hardcoded text (heading, button text, loading message, empty state message, time labels) with translate pipe.

Update apps/web/src/app/recipes/recipe-detail.component.ts: import TranslateModule in imports array, replace all hardcoded text (loading, error, button labels like Edit/Delete, section headings like Ingredients/Instructions, time labels, confirm dialog text, back link) with translate pipe.

Update apps/web/src/app/recipes/recipe-form.component.ts: import TranslateModule in imports array, replace all hardcoded text (page title for new/edit, all form labels, placeholder text, button text like Cancel/Create Recipe/Update Recipe/Saving, section headers, Add button text) with translate pipe. For dynamic strings like the form title (Edit/New), use translate pipe with conditional keys.
Update apps/web/project.json to include 'apps/web/src/assets/i18n' in the assets array so translation JSON files are copied to the build output.
Run 'pnpm nx build web' to verify the build succeeds with all changes.
acceptance_criteria: Translation files exist at apps/web/src/assets/i18n/en.json and apps/web/src/assets/i18n/de.json with comprehensive translations for all UI strings
The German translation file (de.json) has the same keys as the English file with proper German translations
TranslateModule is configured in app.config.ts with HttpLoader pointing to ./assets/i18n/
All components import TranslateModule and use the translate pipe for user-visible strings
A language switcher is visible in the app header allowing switching between English and German
The Angular production build succeeds without errors (pnpm nx build web)
verification: Run 'pnpm nx build web' and confirm it completes without errors
Run 'node scripts/verify-web-build.js' to confirm build output is valid
Verify translation files exist in the build output at dist/apps/web/browser/assets/i18n/en.json and dist/apps/web/browser/assets/i18n/de.json
findings: @ngx-translate/core v18 removed TranslateModule. The new API uses standalone TranslatePipe directly in component imports, provideTranslateService() for configuration, and provideTranslateHttpLoader() for the HTTP loader (no constructor arguments - use config object). currentLang is now a Signal. addLangs() still works but setDefaultLang() is removed - use fallbackLang in config instead.
